Trusted ENT care for the whole family

Breathe easier, hear clearly, and get expert ENT care without the wait.

Personalized ear, nose, and throat treatment focused on accurate diagnosis, compassionate care, and a simple path to reach the clinic when you need help.

Book AppointmentView Services
Experienced ENT SpecialistEasy Clinic ContactPatient-Centered Care
Fast Patient Support

Call, visit, or message the clinic

Trusted by local families

Gentle consultations and clear treatment plans.

3 Years Experience

Trusted ENT consultation for adults, seniors, and children.

Same-Week Appointments

Fast clinic response with guided follow-up support.

Precise Diagnosis

Evidence-based treatment plans designed around your symptoms.

Services

Complete ENT care designed around comfort, clarity, and lasting recovery.

Each service is presented in a patient-friendly format to make treatment options easier to understand and act on.

Ear Infection Treatment

Targeted care for ear pain, discharge, blocked sensation, and recurring infections.

Book Appointment

Hearing Problems

Assessment and management for hearing loss, ringing, and hearing imbalance.

Book Appointment

Sinus & Allergy Care

Relief plans for congestion, sinusitis, facial pressure, and seasonal allergies.

Book Appointment

Tonsil Treatment

Modern evaluation for enlarged tonsils, snoring, and repeated throat discomfort.

Book Appointment

Throat Infection

Care for sore throat, swallowing pain, inflammation, and recurring infections.

Book Appointment

Voice & Swallowing Issues

Specialized support for hoarseness, vocal strain, and swallowing concerns.

Book Appointment

Vertigo / Balance Problems

Evaluation and treatment for dizziness, vertigo episodes, and balance disorders.

Book Appointment

Pediatric ENT Care

Child-friendly ENT consultations for ear, nose, and throat concerns.

Book Appointment

Qualification

Trained in endoscopic surgery

About Me

Specialist-led ENT care built on trust, detail, and thoughtful communication.

Dr. Ananta Biswas provides comprehensive ENT care with a calm, detail-oriented approach focused on diagnosis clarity and long-term recovery.

Doctor

Dr. Ananta Biswas

Experience

ENT specialist
Advanced diagnosis
Personalized treatment
Compassionate care

Patient Feedback

Real stories that help new patients feel reassured before they book.

Patient-centered copy and warm visual treatment create the kind of trust a clinic website should deliver in the first few seconds.

Riya Sharma

Sinus Treatment

The consultation felt thorough and reassuring. I finally got a treatment plan that actually reduced my long-term sinus flare-ups.

Karan Malhotra

Vertigo Care

I appreciated how clearly every step was explained. Booking was easy, the clinic was calm, and I felt better after just a few visits.

Sneha Verma

Pediatric ENT

My daughter was anxious before the appointment, but the doctor was incredibly patient and kind. The experience built trust immediately.

Amit Rao

Hearing Assessment

Professional, punctual, and detail-oriented. The online booking and follow-up communication made the entire process very smooth.

Contact

Make it simple for patients to reach the clinic in the way they prefer.

A high-converting contact area should offer immediate reassurance, clear hours, and multiple ways to take the next step.
